final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a park scene viewed from slightly left of center, capturing a man standing on the left side of the frame and a golden retriever sitting to his right on the ground. The park is now covered in a thick layer of fresh white snow, with visible footprints crisscrossing the foreground grass and surrounding areas. The man wears a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers, his posture relaxed as he smiles at the camera. His golden retriever sits calmly beside him, its long fur appearing slightly fluffier with small clumps of snow clinging to it. In the background, two wooden park benches on the right side are partially buried under snow, their seats and armrests coated in white. A paved path runs behind the benches, also blanketed in snow. To the left, a large tree trunk rises from the snowy ground, its bare branches extending upward and framing the top of the image. Beyond the tree, more park benches and leafy trees are visible, all dusted with snow. In the far distance, a city skyline stretches across a body of water, its buildings faintly visible under an overcast sky. The overall atmosphere is quiet and wintry, with soft diffused light creating gentle shadows across the snow-covered landscape. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors with muted tones due to the snow and cloudy sky. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level shot, facing slightly left of center towards the subject; Foreground: man standing on the left, golden retriever sitting to his right on the grass; Center: clear blue sky above, with tree trunks and branches framing the top half of the image; Background: two wooden park benches on the right side, a paved path behind them, and a distant city skyline across a body of water; Dominant color palette: bright greens from the grass, light blue from the shirt and sky, warm brown tones from the dog and pants. Style reference: Dominant color palette: bright greens from the grass, light blue from the shirt and sky, warm brown tones from the dog and pants; Center: clear blue sky above, with tree trunks and branches framing the top half of the image; Surface materials: smooth grass in the foreground, rough bark on tree trunks, wooden texture on benches, and a glossy finish on the dog's fur; Atmosphere: serene, overcast, open outdoor space with a relaxed mood.

constraints: The photograph is taken from an eye-level perspective, facing slightly left of center towards the subject.
A man is standing on the left side of the frame.
A golden retriever is sitting to the right of the man on the ground.
The park is covered in a thick layer of fresh white snow.
There are visible footprints crisscrossing the foreground grass and surrounding areas.
The man is wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers.
The man's posture is relaxed, and he is smiling at the camera.
The golden retriever is sitting calmly beside the man.
The dog's long fur appears slightly fluffier with small clumps of snow clinging to it.
Two wooden park benches are partially buried under snow on the right side of the frame.
The seats and armrests of the park benches are coated in white snow.
A paved path runs behind the benches and is also blanketed in snow.
A large tree trunk rises from the snowy ground on the left side of the image.
The tree's bare branches extend upward and frame the top of the image.
More park benches and leafy trees are visible beyond the tree, all dusted with snow.
In the far distance, a city skyline stretches across a body of water.
The buildings of the city skyline are faintly visible under an overcast sky.
The overall atmosphere is quiet and wintry, with soft diffused light creating gentle shadows.
The image is photorealistic with sharp focus and natural colors.
The dominant color palette includes bright greens from the grass, light blue from the shirt and sky, and warm brown tones from the dog and pants.
The clear blue sky is visible above, with tree trunks and branches framing the top half of the image.
The surface materials include smooth grass in the foreground, rough bark on tree trunks, wooden texture on benches, and a glossy finish on the dog's fur.
The atmosphere is serene, sunny, and depicts an open outdoor space with a relaxed mood.
